name: meok-abci-bridge-mcp
title: Meok Abci Bridge Mcp
description: MEOK ABCI Bridge MCP — read-only Tendermint / Cosmos blockchain query for agents. Built-in registry of 10 mainnets (Cosmos Hub, Osmosis, Celestia, dYdX, Neutron, Injective, Sei, Akash, Stride, Kava) + custom RPC. ABCI 1.0 + ABCI++ vote extensions. HMAC-signed query results. By MEOK AI Labs.
